description: Address semantic review findings: (1) Insert a Pass state to inject $.errorInfo before Mark Failed on the Choice-otherwise path, (2) Fix extensionless filename handling in Lambda, (3) Add placeholder comments for INPUT_BUCKET_NAME and OUTPUT_BUCKET_NAME env vars.
steps: Step 1 - Add a 'Set Validation Error' Pass state in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts that injects $.errorInfo with Error and Cause fields, and wire it between the Choice .otherwise() and markFailedTask.
Step 2 - Fix extensionless filename handling in lambda/audio-processor/index.ts by checking for presence of a dot before calling lastIndexOf.
Step 3 - Add code comments in lambda/audio-processor/index.ts explaining INPUT_BUCKET_NAME and OUTPUT_BUCKET_NAME are placeholders for future audio processing logic.
Step 4 - Add a test verifying the state machine definition includes a 'Set Validation Error' Pass state.
Step 5 - Update the snapshot and verify all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: Choice-otherwise path routes through a Pass state that sets $.errorInfo before Mark Failed
Lambda provides clear error message for extensionless filenames
INPUT_BUCKET_NAME and OUTPUT_BUCKET_NAME have placeholder comments
All tests pass including new test for Set Validation Error state
verification: Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx jest --no-coverage' and confirm all tests pass
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' and confirm it succeeds
